name: eu-ai-act-scanner
description: EU AI Act (Regulation 2024/1689) compliance harness for Claude Code. 21 code scanners (incl. 7 agent-aware per Nannini et al. 2026) + 11 article-grounded skills covering risk classification (Art. 5/6), high-risk obligations (Art. 9-15, 17), deployer duties and FRIA (Art. 26/27), GPAI (Art. 51/53/55), Annex IV technical documentation, Art. 113 timeline, Art. 99 penalties, plus agentic-AI compound-risk taxonomy (cascading/emergent/attribution/temporal). Local-only static analysis, citation-rigorous skills, written for engineers, compliance officers, and legal counsel.
author: Andrei Bacu (@Peaky8linders)
